title: Gradient descent optimization for deep image classification
abstract: We study gradient descent optimization for deep neural networks on image classification benchmarks.

title: Residual connections in convolutional architectures
abstract: Convolutional architectures achieve strong performance on natural images using residual connections.

title: Transformers without recurrence for sequences
abstract: Transformer models replace recurrence with self-attention for sequence modeling tasks.

title: Masked language modeling for bidirectional representations
abstract: BERT uses masked language modeling to learn bidirectional contextual representations.

title: Scaling laws and emergent abilities in large language models
abstract: Large language models exhibit emergent abilities when scaled with data and compute.

title: Retrieval augmented generation with document stores
abstract: Retrieval augmented generation combines parametric memory with non-parametric document stores.

title: Approximate nearest neighbor search in vector indexes
abstract: Vector databases enable approximate nearest neighbor search over high dimensional embeddings.

title: Redis Stack for low latency search workloads
abstract: Redis Stack integrates search and JSON modules for low latency applications.

title: Convex hulls of finite sets in Euclidean space
abstract: Convex hull algorithms identify extreme points of a finite set in Euclidean space.

title: Quickhull for convex hull computation
abstract: Quickhull is an incremental algorithm widely used for convex hull computation.

title: K-means and centroid-based clustering
abstract: K-means clustering partitions vectors into spherical groups around centroids.

title: Latent themes in large text corpora
abstract: Topic modeling discovers latent themes in large text corpora.

title: Semantic clusters and topic boundaries
abstract: Topic boundaries lie at the periphery of semantic clusters in embedding space.

title: Cosine similarity for normalized embeddings
abstract: Cosine similarity measures directional agreement between normalized embeddings.

title: ANN graphs at billion-vector scale
abstract: Approximate nearest neighbor graphs trade recall for throughput in billion scale search.

title: Hybrid dense retrieval with metadata filters
abstract: Hybrid queries combine dense vectors with structured metadata filters.

title: Innovation at the knowledge frontier
abstract: Scientific discovery often concentrates near the frontier of established knowledge.

title: Citation networks between research communities
abstract: Bibliometric networks map citation flows between research communities.

title: Technical abstract summarization under constraints
abstract: Abstract summarization compresses technical content while preserving claims.

title: Sensitivity of clustering metrics to preprocessing
abstract: Evaluation metrics for clustering remain sensitive to geometry and preprocessing choices.
